name: Toffee Crunch Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
3 bars chocolate-covered toffee, chopped and divided (1.4 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease or paper-line 36 mini-muffin cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In a small bowl, combine milk, sour cream, butter, egg, and vanilla until blended.
5. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. Fold in 2/3 of the chopped toffee.
7. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups, filling almost full.
8. Sprinkle remaining toffee evenly over tops of muffins.
9. Bake for 16 to 18 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from pans and cool on wire racks.
Makes 36 mini muffins.
